name: gs_cover_letter_latest-2.pdf
text: June 30, 2026 Goldman Sachs Subject: Application for Summer Analyst Program – Engineering Division Dear Hiring Team, I am writing to apply for the Summer Analyst Program within the Engineering and Technology Division at Goldman Sachs. I am currently a second-year Computer Engineering student at Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology and have been actively building my skills in machine learning, AI and software development. My technical work has been oriented toward problems at the intersection of data, ML and systems, areas where thoughtful engineering decisions carry real consequence. I am drawn to Goldman Sachs specifically because of the scale and complexity of the problems your Engineering teams engage with, from low-latency infrastructure to machine learning applied to financial systems. Beyond coursework, I have been involved in leadership and community initiatives at my institute, where I have had the opportunity to collaborate with peers on technical and organizational projects. I find that I do my best work in environments that are fast-paced and where the stakes of getting things right are high, which aligns closely with what I understand your culture to value. My resume outlines my academic background, technical experience, and areas of focus in more detail. I would welcome the opportunity to contribute to and learn from the Goldman Sachs Engineering team this summer. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you. Warm regards, Devyang Sharma
